pageContext.name: Harmonia Bloom Belle
pageContext.description: Sideshow and the Good Smile Company present the Harmonia Bloom Belle Collectible Doll.  The courageous Disney Princess, Belle, waltzes into Good Smile Company's Harmonia Bloom doll line. Belle's looks have been faithfully recaptured in her silky hair wig and beloved golden ball gown. A special commemorative base retells the story of Disney's Beauty and the Beast through silhouettes of its characters.  Be sure to add this Belle doll to your Disney collectibles display!
